questions.question: Design a half subtractor with 4-bit inputs and 2-bit output. Show the truth table and the digital circuit.
Write the truth table for a full subtractor with 3-bit inputs and 2-bit output. Explain the carry-out and the borrow bits.
A half subtractor with 2-bit inputs A and B produces an output of 1. Identify the values of A and B, and explain the reason behind this result.
